featured.title: AI Swing Trading Desk
featured.description: A serverless AI-assisted swing trading system that acts as a quantitative analyst and risk manager. Scans for high-probability setups, calculates risk parameters, and maintains a rigorous performance ledger — all through natural language commands.

featured.title: Portfolio Website
featured.description: A modern, responsive portfolio website built with React and Vite. Features a content-data separation architecture where all content lives in JSON files, making it fully AI-manageable through natural language commands.
